theorems.theorem: For any finite Dung AAF, the grounded extension exists, is unique, and is the least fixed point of the characteristic function F
theorems.proof_type: Python implementation with derived iteration bound (|AR|+1 steps)
theorems.engineering_capability: Three-valued output (IN/OUT/UNDEC) for arbitrary attack graphs; correct cycle handling
theorems.limitations: Bounded to finite graphs; no inductive proof for arbitrary N (needs Lean)

theorems.theorem: SCC decomposition provides cycle membership witnesses for all UNDEC arguments
theorems.proof_type: Kosaraju SCC algorithm + Dung cycle analysis
theorems.engineering_capability: Cycle/SCC witness; human review reasons; dispute deadlock structure

theorems.theorem: Horn fixpoint iteration terminates in at most |heads|+1 steps from any initial facts
theorems.proof_type: Python implementation — derived bound from rule head count
theorems.engineering_capability: Saturation/convergence/truncation signaling; proof witnesses per fact
theorems.tests: None yet (wrapper, not integrated into evaluator)
theorems.limitations: Does not modify FixpointEvaluator; k_max still present as external cutoff

theorems.theorem: For any matrix A, spectral radius ρ(A) ≤ ||A||_max (max-row-sum norm)
theorems.proof_type: Rigorous upper bound via max-norm; heuristic power iteration for exact estimate
theorems.engineering_capability: Correct distinction between upper bound and exact spectral radius; convergent stopping rule
theorems.limitations: Power iteration is heuristic; block-triangular contraction requires full coupling analysis

unproved_propositions: Horn completeness without hbound in evaluator body
